name: resume-adaptation
description: Adapts a resume to match a specific job description with ATS scoring and cover letter generation
author: User

resume_input.description: Path to resume file(s) - supports multiple versions (PDF, DOCX, TXT, MD)

job_description.description: Job description source - can be text string, URL, or path to PDF file

requirements.description: Additional user requirements or preferences for the adaptation

output_name.description: Base name for output files (without extension)

ats_score.description: Calculate ATS (Applicant Tracking System) compatibility score

system_prompt: You are a professional resume writer and career coach specializing in tailoring resumes to specific job descriptions. Your goal is to help candidates present their experience in the most relevant way for each opportunity while maintaining honesty and accuracy.

steps.name: parse_inputs
steps.description: Parse and validate all input sources

steps.name: extract_job_requirements
steps.description: Extract key requirements, skills, and qualifications from the job description

steps.name: analyze_resume
steps.description: Analyze the resume(s) to identify relevant experience and skills

steps.name: ats_scoring
steps.description: Calculate ATS compatibility score with detailed analysis

steps.name: map_alignment
steps.description: Map resume content to job requirements, identifying gaps and highlights

steps.name: generate_tailored_resume
steps.description: Generate an adapted resume highlighting relevant experience

steps.name: generate_cover_letter
steps.description: Generate a tailored cover letter matching the job requirements

steps.name: create_output_files
steps.description: Create DOCX and PDF output files for resume and cover letter
